title: Waystone: Currencys
description: Allow configure currency spent on teleport using waystones
body:
This mod add 5 warpRequirements to waystone.Allow currency comsumption from lightmans currency.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0619bd0472cc3b8c27c0a80bfd66009ad2aed1af_0.webp)

`wscurrencys:scaled_add_currency_cost` similar to `scaled_add_xp_cost`  
`wscurrencys:max_currency_cost` similar to `max_xp_cost`  
`wscurrencys:min_currency_cost` similar to `min_xp_cost`  
`wscurrencys:add_currency_cost` similar to `add_xp_cost`  
`wscurrencys:multiply_currency_cost` similar to `multiply_xp_cost`  

Allow using in modpacks.
